Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 2. Analyze the Raw Log bullet list of timed events identifying sequences per app and window such as Focus Typing Save Switch for Document1docx then Email then PDF Excel back to Document1 then QuarterlyReport

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: 3. Determine Case Identification Logic Approach 1 Document as Case Case 1 Document1docx Case 2 Annual Meeting Email Case 3 ReportDraftpdf Case 4 Budget2024xlsx Case 5 QuarterlyReportdocx Approach 2 TaskProject as Case Is Document1docx part of the Quarterly Report Refined Case IDs CASEEmailAnnualMeeting CASEDocument1 CASEReportDraftpdf CASEBudget2024xlsx CASEQuarterlyReportdocx

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets stick to the DocumentTarget as Case approach because process mining needs clear unambiguous boundaries treating them as separate cases shows the actual sequence of how the user juggled resources grouping by the specific entity the document the specific email is the most robust methodology

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: 4. Determine Activity Naming Logic Translate raw verbs FOCUS TYPING SCROLL CLICK HIGHLIGHT into higherlevel businessprocessing activities Document1docx 090000 FOCUS Start Document 090030 TYPING Draft Content 090115 SAVE Save Document Email Annual Meeting 090200 CLICK Open Email 090230 SCROLL Read Email Initiate Reply Draft Reply Send Reply

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: SelfCorrection on Event Granularity Process mining logs shouldnt be excessively granular the text gives specific context Draft intro paragraph Update Q1 figures use this context to make Activity Names descriptive but standardized Draft Text Update Data pure process mining prefers standardized activity names like Draft Text I will use standardized names and put the specifics in a Details attribute

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait what about the initial Focus on QuarterlyReportdocx at 085950 Since the user didnt take any action there and immediately switched to Document1docx it likely represents opening the app and having a background document Lets include it as Open Document for Case 5 to be absolutely faithful to the log

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets refine the consecutive typing timestamps In process mining combining events that happen in a burst eg typing over a few seconds into one semantic event is best practice I will aggregate the 090030 and 090100 typing events into a single Draft Content event at 090030 Same for Excel typing etc

Name: Validation - PE
Text: 7. Review against constraints Data Transformation Yes Case Identification Yes Activity Naming Yes Event Attributes Yes Coherent Narrative Yes Explanation Yes Final Polish Ensure tone is expert and analytical Ensure the table is chronologically ordered which inherently shows the interleaving of cases a hallmark of concurrent multitasking process mining
